$comment: Design token file for the Carousel Arrow component
$description: Circular navigation button overlaid on the carousel to advance or retreat slides. Props: chevron direction (Left/Right), size (sm/md/lg), colour theme (Primary/Secondary/Tertiary), and interactive state (Default/Hover/Active/Disabled). Primary is a solid filled blue button used on light backgrounds. Secondary is a dark semi-opaque button (with backdrop blur) for use on image/video slides. Tertiary is a white/glass button (with backdrop blur on sm and md; lg Tertiary omits blur in Figma). All sizes use 8px uniform padding.

padding.description: Uniform 8px inset on all sides — applies to all sizes and themes- 2xs - 8px

left.description: GHL icon name for the left-facing chevron

right.description: GHL icon name for the right-facing chevron

button-size.description: Width and height of the sm circular button- xs - 32px

icon-size.description: Width and height of the sm chevron icon- icon/xs - 16px

border-radius.description: Fully circular sm button (3xl - 20px border radius on a 32px element)

button-size.description: Width and height of the md circular button- sm - 36px

icon-size.description: Width and height of the md chevron icon- icon/md - 20px

border-radius.description: Fully circular md button (3xl - 20px border radius on a 36px element)

button-size.description: Width and height of the lg circular button- md - 40px

icon-size.description: Width and height of the lg chevron icon- icon/lg - 24px

primary.description: Solid filled blue button. No backdrop blur. Icon is always white.

icon-color.description: White icon color chevron on all Primary states- gray/0 - #ffffff

disabled.description: Washed-out light blue when the arrow is unavailable (first/last slide)- blue/300 - #84adff

secondary.description: Dark semi-opaque button designed for use over image/video content. Applies backdrop-blur 4px on all sizes.

icon-color.description: White icon color chevron on all Secondary states- gray/0 - #ffffff

default.description: Dark gray background at rest- gray/600 - #475467

disabled.description: Light gray when the arrow is unavailable- gray/300 - #d0d5dd

tertiary.description: White glass button. Backdrop blur applies to sm and md only — lg Tertiary omits blur (Figma source inconsistency, preserved faithfully). Icon colour shifts from gray/600 to gray/300 when disabled.

default.description: Dark gray chevron in Default/Hover/Active states- gray/600 - #475467

disabled.description: Faded gray chevron when the arrow is unavailable- gray/300 - #d0d5dd

active.description: Light gray background on press- gray/200 - #eaecf0

disabled.description: White background when unavailable — same as default; only the icon colour signals disabled state- gray/0 - #ffffff
